intro:
Let's stir up some undercover chaos!
Slip past teachers, bosses, and parents, and play to your heart's content!
description:
School, work, home—there are lots of places to play!
Enjoy the thrill as you try not to get caught!
Up to 6 players can join in the fun with a Joy-Con™ for each player!
Watch for the perfect timing to earn as many points as possible!

《Roles》
・Actor
  Play to earn points and try not to get caught!
  Play at a sparkling location to earn even more points!

・Watcher
  Find people playing to earn points!

[Time Attack]
Aim for the fastest clear possible and climb the rankings!
Play without getting caught and try to reduce your time!

[Battle]
Compete for the highest score against friends and CPUs!
Play skillfully to earn the most points!

[Online Mode]
Play in real time against players around the world!
Up to 4 people can play at a time!

In friendly and online matches, the roles are decided randomly!
Finding out which role you'll be is part of the fun!
